label: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 4

extraction.one_line_summary: JAKOBSEN won the sprint after PHILIPSEN was boxed out in the technical finale, taking green jersey and demonstrating fearless form post-injury comeback.
tactical_patterns: SÉNÉCHAL took intermediate sprint points specifically to deny JAKOBSEN's rivals, revealing Deceuninck leadout rider sprint blocking tactics.
PHILIPSEN isolated and boxed in technical finale despite being race leader suggests Quick-Step targeted positioning disruption pre-sprint.
DÉMARE led out the sprint but JAKOBSEN used him as screen, exploiting FDJ's early positioning for slipstream advantage.

rider_signals.JAKOBSEN Fabio: positive: Beat top-tier sprinters including DÉMARE in technical finish, showing complete confidence recovery and tactical patience using rivals as screens.
rider_signals.PHILIPSEN Jasper: negative: Boxed out and isolated in finale despite holding green jersey, team positioning failed in compressed technical approach.
rider_signals.DÉMARE Arnaud: neutral: Strong leadout position but unable to hold off JAKOBSEN who drafted him, suggests raw power without final-200m acceleration.
rider_signals.TAARAMÄE Rein: negative: Crashed within 3km, avoided time loss only via rule, reveals vulnerability in nervous finale positioning for non-sprinters.
rider_signals.BOU Joan: positive: Won intermediate sprint for breakaway team Burgos despite no sprint pedigree, shows opportunistic points hunting works on transfer stages.
